steps.title: Write the mass relationships
steps.content: Let the masses be $A$, $B$, and $C$. The statements give $$A=5.04B$$$$A=0.00072C$$

steps.title: Convert to the requested value
steps.content: So $C$ is $700000\%$ of $B$, meaning $p=700000$. Then $$\frac{p}{1000}=\frac{700000}{1000}=700$$The answer is 700.
